GraphQL endpoint confirmed at api-insights-test2.takeda.io/batches/graphql. Stored as dev2 so --env flag switches environments automatically.
Purchase order service exposes /api/v1 and /api/v2 routers under /purchase.
Base URL is a placeholder — confirm actual gateway path.
REST side of the batches service — board views, batch details, and events.
Base URL is a placeholder — confirm actual gateway path.

workbook_imports.notes: Imported from API_Automation_Test_Data.xlsx using the Risk alias.
Platform workbook cases are mutations, so they are cataloged but not enabled by default.

manual_cases.name: Purchase order safety stock weeks of coverage v2
PO Adherence - Fetch SDN_Status in batch card (TC-11463)
manual_cases.notes: Verify sdn_status field is present in each batch object and its value is either null or 'active'. Covers BICN-136017 R_1.19.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Error handling for invalid Tag and Stage (TC-11464)
manual_cases.notes: Negative: invalid Tag=XYZ and Stage=Invalid with OPU=sm&o, Brand=IXAZOMIB. Response code is 200 but data body returns null/empty. Covers BICN-136017 R_1.19.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Retrieve batch data with optimized response time (TC-11160)
manual_cases.notes: Verify API response time is below performance threshold (timeout_seconds=30 enforces this). stage_code+site_type required — bare page/limit call returns 500. Response must contain only required fields and return bulk batch data correctly with no functional regression. Covers BICN-131960 R_1.18.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Batch Stages with all params OPU+Brand+Tag+Stage (TC-11276)
manual_cases.notes: Valid search with OPU=SMO, Brand=BRIGATINIB, site_type=External (Tag), stage_code=B (Drug Product). Response 200 with batch_stages list. Covers BICN-111957 R_1.17.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Multiple status values as input to batches API (TC-11277)
manual_cases.notes: Verify batch_status accepts comma-separated multiple values (urgent,in_progress). Response includes batches of both statuses. Covers BICN-111593 R_1.16.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - count_status_by=batch returns only batch counts (TC-11279 step 1)
manual_cases.notes: count_status_by=batch: batch_statuses_count is populated with real counts; material_statuses_count fields are all zero. Covers BICN-127526 R_1.18.0 step 1. NOTE: returns HTTP 500 on release/dev-new — server-side bug; single-value count_status_by triggers a crash in the current build. Expect this to resolve when BICN-127526 is fully deployed.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - count_status_by=material returns only material counts (TC-11279 step 2)
manual_cases.notes: count_status_by=material: material_statuses_count is populated with real counts; batch_statuses_count fields are all zero. Covers BICN-127526 R_1.18.0 step 2. NOTE: returns HTTP 500 on release/dev-new — same server-side bug as step 1; single-value count_status_by triggers a crash in the current build.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - count_status_by=batch,material returns both counts (TC-11279 step 3)
manual_cases.notes: count_status_by=batch,material: both batch_statuses_count and material_statuses_count are populated with real counts. Covers BICN-127526 R_1.18.0 step 3.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Batch Stages count_status_by material (TC-11284)
manual_cases.notes: batch-stages v2 with count_status_by=material: brands_data contains batch_counts and material_counts per stage. Covers BICN-134146 R_1.18.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Date range with plant rank, WOC, PSS and supply model fields (TC-11299)
manual_cases.notes: Verify response includes plant rank, weeks_of_coverage (current_weeks_of_coverage, planned_safety_stock_weeks), and supply_model_category_code fields. Covers BICN-40350 R_1.15.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Event ID present in plants events array (TC-11300)
manual_cases.notes: Verify each event in plants.events includes an 'id' field (1-5). Batch 12931277 (EVOBRIG 180MG BRA, External CMO). Covers BICN-89125 R_1.15.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Batch with PSS and WOC values in weeks_of_coverage (TC-11301)
manual_cases.notes: Verify weeks_of_coverage contains planned_safety_stock_weeks and current_weeks_of_coverage for batch BTCH4502015451500420 (EQUASYM DEPOT 10MG Norway, External CMO TPI-IB IT). Covers BICN-108256 R_1.17.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Batch with forecast_next_6_weeks_avg, GRPT and PDT fields (TC-11302)
manual_cases.notes: Verify plants include planned_delivery_time_days (PDT) and goods_received_processing_time_days (GRPT); weeks_of_coverage includes forecast_next_6_weeks_avg. Batch 12771727 (NINLARO 2.3MG External CMO PCI Pharma UK). Covers BICN-117355 R_1.17.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - Batch stages accommodates Smart Search (TC-11303)
manual_cases.notes: Verify batch-stages v2 API accommodates Smart Search requirements. Covers BICN-120829 R_1.17.0.

manual_cases.name: PO Adherence - API documentation comments present in openapi.json (TC-11305)
manual_cases.notes: Verify openapi.json is accessible and contains documentation comments for batches v1, batch-stages v2, and safety-stock weeks-of-coverage v2 endpoints. Covers BICN-125860 R_1.18.0.

manual_cases.notes: URL confirmed (api-insights-dev2.takeda.io/batches/graphql). Enable this case and replace TODO_BATCH_ID / TODO_PO / TODO_PO_ITEM with real identifiers before running.

body.query:
query MyQuery {
  fetchCoaTestProdSpecMap(
    coaTestProdSpecMapInput: {batchId: "TEXC04", regionDesc: "REGION1"}
  ) {
    testName
    batchId
    materialId
    productReleaseDatetime
    productSpecificationCode
    regionDescription
    siteStdName
    specficationRuleDescription
    specificationAnalysisCode
    specificationComponentName
    specificationMaxValue
    specificationMinValue
    specificationTextValue
    testResultDescription
    testSpecificationDescription
  }
}

query MyQuery {
  fetchCoaTestProdSpecMap(
    coaTestProdSpecMapInput: {batchId: "dd", regionDesc: "REGION1"}
  ) {
    testName
    batchId
    materialId
    productReleaseDatetime
    productSpecificationCode
    regionDescription
    siteStdName
    specficationRuleDescription
    specificationAnalysisCode
    specificationComponentName
    specificationMaxValue
    specificationMinValue
    specificationTextValue
    testResultDescription
    testSpecificationDescription
  }
}

query MyQuery {
  fetchCoaTestProdSpecMap(
    coaTestProdSpecMapInput: {batchId: ", regionDesc: "REGION1"}
  ) {
    testName
    batchId
    materialId
    productReleaseDatetime
    productSpecificationCode
    regionDescription
    siteStdName
    specficationRuleDescription
    specificationAnalysisCode
    specificationComponentName
    specificationMaxValue
    specificationMinValue
    specificationTextValue
    testResultDescription
    testSpecificationDescription
  }
}

body.query:
query MyQuery {
  fetch_process_quality_details(
    param_value: {manufacturing_stage: "Drug Substance", clinical_code: "TAK-279", site_name: "Cambrex Charles City"}
  ) {
    clinical_code
    data_source
    load_time_stamp
    manufacturing_stage
    opu
    process_id
    process_name
    site
    ... on TechTransfer {
      process_id
      process_name
      clinical_code
      data_source
      load_time_stamp
      manufacturing_stage
      opu
      project_id
      receiving_unit
      sending_unit
      site
      user_name
      workspace_id
      workspace_name
    }
  }
}

query MyQuery {
  fetch_tech_transfer_details {
    clinical_code
    data_source
    load_time_stamp
    manufacturing_stage
    opu
    process_id
    process_name
    project_id
    receiving_unit
    sending_unit
    site
    user_name
    workspace_id
    workspace_name
  }
}

manual_cases.name: NMT GraphQL FetchScenarioRecommendationVariants

body.query:
query FetchScenarioRecommendationVariants {
  fetchScenarioVariants(
    scenarioInput: {scenarioId: "scen-61c6b2835b8e403ba199d23c4ff23b2a", sortFilter: {field: EFFICIENCY_RANK, order: ASC}, pagination: {page: 1, limit: 10}}
  ) {
    variants {
      efficiencyRank
      laneId
      scenarioId
      variantId
      variantName
      baseMetrics {
        co2PerPack
        co2Score
        costPerPack
        costScore
        finalScore
        leadTime
        leadTimeScore
        shippingSolution {
          name
          ratio
          __typename
        }
        palletQuantity
        palletPercentage
        numberOfShipments
        modeSplit {
          airPercentage
          roadPercentage
          seaPercentage
          __typename
        }
        totalCo2
        totalCost
        totalPallets
        __typename
      }
      efficiencyScore
      improvements
      modifiedParameter
      tradeOffs
      variantDescription
      variantMetrics {
        co2PerPackDiff
        co2PerPackImpact
        co2PerPackSensitivity
        co2ScoreDiff
        co2ScoreImpact
        co2ScoreSensitivity
        costPerPackDiff
        costPerPackImpact
        costPerPackSensitivity
        costScoreDiff
        costScoreImpact
        costScoreSensitivity
        finalScoreDiff
        finalScoreImpact
        totalCostSensitivity
        totalCostRankDiff
        totalCostImpact
        totalCostDiff
        totalCo2Sensitivity
        totalCo2RankDiff
        totalCo2Impact
        totalCo2Diff
        scenarioMetrics {
          co2PerPack
          co2Score
          totalPallets
          totalCost
          totalCo2
          palletQuantity
          palletPercentage
          numberOfShipments
          leadTimeScore
          leadTime
          finalScore
          costScore
          costPerPack
          modeSplit {
            airPercentage
            roadPercentage
            seaPercentage
            __typename
          }
          shippingSolution {
            name
            ratio
            __typename
          }
          __typename
        }
        leadTimeSensitivity
        leadTimeScoreSensitivity
        leadTimeScoreImpact
        leadTimeScoreDiff
        leadTimeRankDiff
        leadTimeImpact
        leadTimeDiff
        finalScoreSensitivity
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    totalRecords
    page
    limit
    __typename
  }
}

manual_cases.notes: Results are scenario-specific — compare against same-scenario baseline.
